rules.rule: validated_object_hash must identify the exact object that reaches execution.
invalid, missing, stale, mismatched, or replayed objects must not execute.
state-changing production deploys must route through authority, compile, validate, execute, and proof.
direct deploy commands must remain disabled or non-production unless routed through governed workflow controls.
used authority, reused invocation nonce, or reused execution object must be blocked.
proof must be persisted only after the execution boundary accepts the validated object.
files under governance/mindshift-validation-bundle are audit references and must not execute, deploy, authorize, or mutate runtime.
